title: phyllanthus dalbergioides
intro: Phyllanthus dalbergioides, also known as Sama or Semalai, is a plant species within the Phyllanthaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an anti-diabetic agent, as well as possessing immunomodulatory and anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Phyllanthus dalbergioides is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
